sourceMovie.title: Agent Zeta
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Agent Zeta (2026) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: No Way Out
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Agent Zeta clicked for you, No Way Out (1987) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Agent Zeta?
faq.answer: Try No Way Out, The Hummingbird Project, Rogue Agent—each shares DNA with Agent Zeta while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Agent Zeta?
faq.answer: Agent Zeta (2026) is best described as Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Agent Zeta worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
